group.label: Activate & Register your License & General Settings

field.label: Register License
field.comment: Register and Activate your ebizmarts payment Suite

group.label: Apple Pay, Google Pay & Wallets
group.comment: Allow customers to do express checkout via Apple Pay, Google Pay and/or Stripe Link.

group.label: Pay by Link
group.comment: Customer receives an email afterwards to finalize payment from Stripe-hosted checkout.

group.label: Recover Failed Orders
group.comment: Recover all your failed orders and boost your sales.

field.label: Enabled
field.comment: Advanced settings

group.label: Secure PCI DSS compliant MOTO orders
group.comment: Send a MO/TO payment request to one of your available terminals.

field.label: Enabled
field.comment: Advanced settings

field.label: Allow repeat transactions
field.comment: Needed for repeat transactions and token functionality

field.label: Save Credit Card Tokens
field.comment: Customer's credit card will be saved as a secure token for quick access in the future. Your merchant account needs to have this feature enabled.

field.label: Enable Order Sync By Cron
field.comment: Enables cron that sync orders from Opayo API.

field.label: Sync Attempts
field.comment: Number of attempts to sync an order that failed to sync by cron.

field.label: Reporting API User
field.comment: Your merchant's credentials, same as the ones to access Opayo's dashboard.

field.label: Debug Mode
field.comment: This will create two new logs and start logging more information. We recommend having it disabled unless it's required.

field.label: Prevent personal data logging
field.comment: Customers' personal information will no longer be logged, XXXXX will be logged instead.

field.label: 3D Secure Authentication
field.comment: The 3D Secure configuration is also declared in Opayo's dashboard and will be overwritten by this setting if not set to 'default'.

field.label: Avs/Cvc Authentication
field.comment: The Avs/Cvc configuration is also declared in Opayo's dashboard and will be overwritten by this setting if not set to 'default'.

field.label: Auto-invoice Authorized Orders with Low Risk of Fraud
field.comment: If payment action is to DEFER or AUTHORIZE the orders will be automatically invoiced by a cron if the risk of fraud is low.

field.label: The score that the defer order can auto invoice
field.comment: Max score number for allowing auto-invoice on DEFER (Default value is: 80). Range between 1-80

field.label: Set on hold order until fraud result
field.comment: If payment action is to DEFER or AUTHORIZE the orders will be set on hold until we receive fraud results.

field.label: Gift Aid
field.comment: This allows the gift aid acceptance box to appear for this transaction on the payment page. This only appears if your vendor account is Gift Aid enabled.

field.label: Send email on automatic invoice?
field.comment: If payment action is Authorize and Capture, an invoice confirmation email is sent

field.label: Max amount of tokens per customer
Same site cookie value
field.comment: This option set the PHPSESSID SameSite cookie to None. Enabling this might help with session lost issues.

field.label: Quote validator
field.comment: Enable quote validator to block orders with REST API

field.label: Cancel Pending Payment Orders Cron
field.comment: Time needed after an order set in Pending Payment is automatically cancelled.

field.label: Payment Action
field.comment: Details of all possible payment actions can be found here.

field.label: Vendor Email
field.comment: If you wish to use multiple email addresses, you should add them using the : (colon) character as a separator. e.g. me@mail1.com:me@mail2.com.

field.label: Email Message
field.comment: A message to the customer which is inserted into the successful transaction emails only. If provided this message is included toward the top of the customer confirmation emails.

field.label: Challenge Window Size
field.comment: Dimensions of the challenge window that has been displayed to the Cardholder.

field.label: Payment Action
field.comment: Details of all possible payment actions can be found here.

field.label: Low Profile Enabled
field.comment: A LOW profile returns the simplified payment pages which have only one step and minimal formatting. You will NOT be able to accept PayPal transactions or Local European Payments if enabled.

field.label: Payment Action
field.comment: Details of all possible payment actions can be found here.

field.label: Payment Action
field.comment: Details of all possible payment actions can be found here.
